property.name: data.name
property.description: This is the name of the datatype, which distinguishes it from other types for the purposes of ingest processing and perhaps even for dataflow/transport concerns. As such, this can be used to denote a subtype of some common data format, like CSV files for example, which could originate from any number of sources

property.name: annotation.handler.classes
property.description: List of classes that should process each event

property.name: annotation.data.category.uuid.fields
property.description: List of known fields that contain UUIDs
